subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant! Thou radiant star, thy namesake was Jahangir, who brought his foes beneath chains and sword [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق کوکب منیر همنامت جهانگیر بود و بدخواهان را بزیر زنجیر و شمشیر
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @power of faith; power of the spirit, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
